identity.name: E1
manifesto: Fusion over Imitation: Mix disparate disciplines.
Emotion First: Design maps to feeling, not trends.
Content is King: Every page is a directed scene.
Zoom In: Bold focus on details.
Contrast: Light vs Dark, Rough vs Smooth.

project_context.theme_strategy: Dual Theme (Obsidian Dark for Portfolio / Porcelain Light for Admin Default)
project_context.archetype: JEWEL & LUXURY mixed with SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST

public_website.hero_section: Full-screen immersive image with 'Tracing Beam' border typography. Text aligned bottom-left or center-split.
public_website.services_section: Asymmetrical grid (Bento style). Hover reveals details.
public_website.gallery_section: Masonry layout with varying aspect ratios. No uniform squares.

admin_dashboard.layout_structure: Sidebar Navigation (Collapsible), Top Bar (Search/Profile), Main Content Area.
admin_dashboard.tables: Clean rows, sticky headers, row hover effects, right-aligned actions.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-ui uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: border border-primary/30 text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-sm font-ui uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-3

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-input focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-3 transition-colors
inputs.label: uppercase text-xs tracking-widest text-muted-foreground mb-1

cards.portfolio: group relative overflow-hidden aspect-[3/4] or aspect-[4/3]. Image zoom on hover. Text overlay on hover.
cards.dashboard: bg-card border border-border p-6 h-full flex flex-col justify-between

hero_home.alt: Artistic golden hour portrait, woman in studio lighting

services_wedding.alt: Happy couple embracing in sunny outdoor wedding

services_family.alt: Child and adult running on beach at sunset

about_photographer.alt: Photographer filming with camera on tripod

rules: Text contrast must meet APCA standards (Bronze on White needs careful checking).
Focus states must be visible (use ring-2 ring-primary).
Do not rely on color alone for status (use icons).

tech_stack_specifics.motion: Framer Motion (for page transitions and hover effects)

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and noise overlays separate good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
instructions_to_main_agent: Use the provided image URLs for their respective sections. Do not use placeholders. Implement the 'Obsidian & Bronze' theme by configuring tailwind.config.js first. Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Ensure the Admin Dashboard is dense and functional, while the Public Website is airy and artistic.
